response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and modern tooling, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His leadership and mentoring experience is present but not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps engineering, which is a key preference for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and mentoring across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, and developer tooling).
Proven track record of leading open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and establishing engineering best practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
Strong technical communication skills, evidenced by workshops, talks, and contributions to developer communities.
concerns: Only limited experience with C++ (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit mention of large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, distributed systems, or production-level cloud architecture in recent roles.
Technical leadership experience is broad but not clearly aligned with cloud/DevOps mentorship or internal platform strategy.
